Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an exceptionally strong performer in AGX, which ranks #1 with a score of 96.2 and demonstrates extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—posting 2010% returns over 10 years, 1368% over 5 years, and 340% over the past year, all while dramatically outperforming SPY by 1764% over the decade. AGX passes all four momentum ratio thresholds, trades above all major moving averages, and shows a "clean" momentum signal with a "strong_buy" flag, though its relatively thin volatility (0.728 ratio) warrants attention. In contrast, MUSA presents a mixed picture: while it shows strong long-term credentials with 908% ten-year returns and solid momentum ratios, its one-year performance of just 20% significantly lags SPY, resulting in a negative relative return of -7.58% over the past year, suggesting a recent momentum deterioration despite historical strength. Both tickers maintain healthy positioning above their 200-day moving averages, but AGX's sustained outperformance across all comparison windows stands in sharp relief to MUSA's recent underperformance relative to broad market indices.
